architecture.route: A strong reasoning model, optionally followed by Codex for implementation.
architecture.title: Architecture

debug.route: Codex for local inspection, logs, commands, and targeted fixes.
debug.title: Debugging

eval.route: Repeatable local or hosted model runs scored with the same rubric.
eval.title: Model Evaluation

extraction.route: A structured-output model or local script, with schema validation.
extraction.title: Data Extraction

implementation.route: Codex or another coding agent with filesystem and terminal access.
implementation.title: Implementation

research.route: A web-capable model, with primary sources required for unstable facts.
research.title: Research

review.route: A strong reasoning model or Codex when repository context is needed.
review.title: Review

security.route: A strong reasoning model plus a red-team review pass.
security.title: Security
